result.summary: Found 2 major visual issues: text truncation in the navigation and game cards being cut off on the right side of the screen.

issues.description: Navigation tab 'Hot Gar' is truncated and should read 'Hot Games'. The text is cut off on the right side.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the tab label width or font size to ensure full text 'Hot Games' is visible, or use responsive design to handle smaller screens better.

issues.description: Game cards in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections appear to be partially cut off on the right edge of the screen. The rightmost game card is not fully visible.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the grid container has proper constraints and padding. Verify the grid is responsive and doesn't extend beyond the viewport width. Consider adjusting card width or using proper overflow handling.
